user.title: Connect to Bambuddy
user.description: Enter the Bambuddy host URL. An API token is only needed if Bambuddy authentication is enabled (it is off on the LAN).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Bambuddy at that host.
error.no_printers: Connected, but Bambuddy reports no printers.

abort.already_configured: This Bambuddy host is already configured.
